channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: RAG at scale: 3 costs tutorials hide
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline costs 78% with deterministic answers, smart caching, and Qdrant — the mistakes and numbers most tutorials skip. Real fintech support agent data from 500k DAU in 2026.

item.title: Mis-size your DB pool
item.description: Stop wasting cloud budget on wrong connection pool sizes. Cut API latency 60% and reduce database costs 15% using a 3-factor model most teams ignore in 2026.

item.title: Senior devs flee Big Tech’s hidden friction
item.description: Cut API latency 57% and MTTR 82% with Redis cache wrapper — connection pools, stampede locks, Prometheus metrics and the real reasons senior devs leave big tech

item.title: 2026 AI salary bumps: embeddings & search skills
item.description: 2026 data: engineers skilled in vector search earn 28% more, but embedding optimization pays off earlier—benchmark results, salary ranges, and the exact latency/cost trade-offs most teams ignore.

item.title: Compare WebSocket, SSE, polling head-to-head
item.description: Choose realtime tech in 2026 with hard latency and cost numbers — WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling benchmarked on Node 20, Redis 7.2, and 1000 mobile clients.

item.title: Swapped $84 AI tools for free
item.description: Cut $1,008/year by swapping five paid AI tools for self-hosted LLMs — concrete configs, benchmarks, and the mistakes I made first

item.title: Get paid fair remote salary from low-cost country
item.description: How to negotiate remote salary from a lower-cost country in 2026 — anchor to US/EU benchmarks, justify discounts with Numbeo data, and close deals with a repeatable process.

item.title: Compare WebSockets, SSE, long polling
item.description: Cut real-time latency 60% — compare WebSockets, SSE, and polling with Node 20, Redis 7.2, and uWebSockets.js 20.49.0 benchmarks in 2026

item.title: Recruiters ignore your GitHub repo—here’s what they watch instead
item.description: Show production-grade code, not polished projects — war stories beat READMEs for remote hiring. Benchmarks, PR links, and postmortems land interviews faster than cloned boilerplates.

item.title: AI skills that pay 2026: data breakdown
item.description: Cut AI cloud spend 77% with cost engineering — prompt vs cost skills, salary benchmarks, and the pipeline mistakes most teams miss in 2026.

item.title: 3 RAG pitfalls prod teams hit first
item.description: Cut RAG latency 60% and AWS bill $71/month — the three production traps tutorials skip: prompt size, cache locality, and reranking overhead. Includes exact code, numbers, and the mistake I spent three days debugging.

item.title: Idle pools starve threads: DB tuning’s fatal flaw
item.description: Cut API response time 60% with database connection pooling — the max pool size mistake 80% of teams make in 2026 and how to fix it with PostgreSQL 15, pgbouncer 1.21, and Node.js 20 metrics.

item.title: Senior devs flee big tech: not pay, but prod pain
item.description: The latency target of 50 ms isn’t arbitrary — it’s the point where users start to notice.

item.title: Review AI PRs in under 15 mins
item.description: Cut code review time 73% with AI diffs using risk tiers, property tests, and golden masters. 2026 benchmarks and a 12-minute workflow that catches more bugs than full line-by-line audits.

item.title: Portfolio kills your hire chances
item.description: Prove you can run production systems with one service, not dozens of polished repos. 800 lines of code beats a GitHub graveyard for remote jobs from Africa in 2026.

item.title: RAG in prod: the traps docs won’t warn you about
item.description: Cut RAG latency 4.3× and infra bill $180/mo: the two-stage model trick and pgvector 0.7.0 the docs won’t mention.

item.title: Pool size is not CPU cores
item.description: Cut database latency 50% by sizing connection pools correctly — the CPU-cores rule is wrong in 2026. Learn how to measure, tune, and monitor pools for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and serverless.

item.title: Choose the right realtime tech
item.description: Cut real-time update latency 40% by choosing the right push tech — WebSockets vs SSE vs long polling benchmarks with Node 20 LTS and Redis 7.2

item.title: Convince them: remote salary in 3 emails
item.description: Increase remote salary offers 32% in 2026 using PPP rates table, email templates, and cost-parity proof. Build the exact scripts used in Colombia, Brazil, and Mexico.

item.title: 2026 AI roles: which skills pay most
item.description: 2026 salary data: prompt engineers with production metrics earn 28% more than peers. See the real skills that move the needle—benchmarks, tools, and the mistake most teams still make.
